text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With weeks of intense training behind her, the
day of the Hanshin Daishoten has finally come for
Mayano Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She flies forward with her engines at full throttle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the race, she spots Narita Brian and
challenges her directly to a no-holds-barred race.
